sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109293" key="u(posfrai/nomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπ-οσφραίνομαι</orth>, <sense id="n109293.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">get scent of</tr_> a thing, interpol. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
